roa.docketEntryComment: /CAL:DISTRICT ATTORNEY'S OR PAROLE'S PETITION TO REVOKE OR MODIFY PAROLE PURSUANT TO PC3000,08/PDP/X:THE DA'S MOTION TO AMEND THE PETITION TO ALLEGEVIOLATIONS #4 - DISTURBING THE PEACE; #5 - POSS, METH,, IS GRANTED,/WIAPTR/3000ADV/3000ADM/X:THE PAROLEE'S ADMISSION IS AS TO VIOLATIONS #4, #5 ONLY,/3000REIN/PAJ:65 DAYS  /X:PAROLEE SHALL RECEIVE CREDIT FOR  19  DAYS,/4019HALF/X:CLIENT MAY SERVE HIS SENTENCE THROUGH A RESIDENTIAL DRUG TREATMENT PROGRAM,  CLIENT MUST COMPLETE 60 DAYS OF ACTUAL TREATMENT AT HEALTHRIGHT360,  HE WILL BE TRANSPORTED TO THE PROGRAM BY THE SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT,A BED WILL BE AVAILABLE FOR CLIENT ON THURSDAY, MAY 22, 2014, THIS HAS BEEN CONFIRMED BY MICHAEL DAVILA OF HEALTHRIGHT360,  ADULT PAROLE HAS THE DISCRETION TOMODIFY TREATMENT, CHANGE THE TREATMENT PROGRAM, SEND PAROLEE INTOA DETOX FACILITY IN THE EVENT OF A RELAPSE AND IMPLEMENT ANY OTHER THERAPEUTIC MEASURE AS DEEMED APPROPRIATE DURING THE 60 DAYS OF TREATMENT,  IF CLIENT FAILS TO COMPLETE HIS 60 DAYS OF ACTUAL TREATMENT WITHOUT A LAWFUL JUSTIFICATION, HE MAY BE SUBJECT TO A NEW PETITION BASED UPON A VIOLATIONOF A COURT ORDER, VIOLATION # 1 - ABSCONDING IS DISMISSED,VIOLATION # 2 - ROBBERYIS DISMISSED,VIOLATION # 3 - ASSAULT IS DISMISSED,COURT FINDS GOOD CAUSE TOREINSTATE PAROLE AS OF 4-21-2014 WITHOUT ANY TIMELOSS,/ /X:PAROLEE ORDEREDTO REPORT TO PAROLE UPON RELEASE AND COMPLY WITH TREATMENT PER PAROLE AGENT,/
